value.found_quote: Thank you for the feedback! We appreciate you taking the time to share these thoughts—we'll be filing a formal feature request for a mobile remote control/companion app for Antigravity.
value.rationale: The page is a community forum thread where users are *requesting* a mobile/remote control feature for Google Antigravity. Google's own representative (Thatipamula_Namratha) responds by saying they will "file a formal feature request" — confirming this feature does NOT exist yet as a first-party Google offering. All the remote control solutions discussed on the page are third-party, community-built open-source projects (porta, Levitation, AG2R, etc.), not official Google offerings. The page does not substantiate that Google itself offers a Remote Control (mobile/web) feature for steering or approving agent runs.
